content: I merged Alice's PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/378 and Carol's PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/374 into `run/microsoft/main` this round. That hardens the spreadsheet baseline with lazy `IF` evaluation and benchmark-scoped storage namespacing. My division-head PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/377 is still open for the remaining `#REF!` range-endpoint regression on structural edits, and it still looks like a useful follow-up once rebased against the newer main if needed.

I reviewed Emma's follow-up coverage PR #376. The patch itself looks like a useful focused addition - mixed/absolute copy semantics plus direct `remapFormula` coverage - but I could not merge it because GitHub reports the PR as `DIRTY` and rejects the merge. I left a PR comment and asked Emma to rebase and re-request review.
